creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # grep remmina /var/log/messages
Aug  2 09:57:22 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd pkg[40707]: remmina upgraded: 1.4.30 -> 1.4.30_1 
Aug  2 11:25:58 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 7383 (remmina), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
Aug  2 11:29:53 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 7662 (remmina), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
Aug  2 11:31:39 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 10020 (remmina), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
Aug  2 11:42:08 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 13073 (remmina), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # bectl list -c creation | grep 789df254cc9e
n264312-789df254cc9e-a -      -          176M  2023-07-25 11:49
n264312-789df254cc9e-b -      -          45.3M 2023-07-27 17:54
n264312-789df254cc9e-c -      -          345M  2023-07-31 04:44
n264312-789df254cc9e-d NR     /          418G  2023-08-02 09:11
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # bectl activate n264312-789df254cc9e-b
Successfully activated boot environment n264312-789df254cc9e-b
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # exit
logout
% 

I don't have time right now to get a backtrace (sorry), crashes were a show-stopper at work, so I reverted from bugged boot environment n264312-789df254cc9e-d to n264312-789df254cc9e-b
